info.title: JSON Diff - RFC 6902 JSON Patch Generator
info.description: Command-line tool for generating RFC 6902 JSON Patch documents by comparing two JSON files. Strictly implements RFC 6902 with no proprietary formats or extensions. Part of the SpecWorks specification-based component collection.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates RFC 6902 compliant JSON Patch documents by comparing two JSON files.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this help message
Output:
The tool outputs a JSON Patch document (RFC 6902) to stdout.
The patch can be applied to the source to transform it into the target.
Exit Codes:
0  Success
1  Invalid arguments or file not found
2  Invalid JSON in input files
3  Error generating diff

arguments.name: SOURCE_FILE
arguments.description: Path to the source JSON file

arguments.name: TARGET_FILE
arguments.description: Path to the target JSON file
